summary: A uniformed U.S. Border Patrol official (name tape M. BANKS) speaks directly to camera against a green studio backdrop with subtitle captions, stating that race is not considered in deportations and that 'if you're in the country illegally, you have something to worry about.' There is no music.
notable_text: Captions: 'Race is not included or considered when deportations or anything.'; 'If you're in the country illegally, you have something to worry about.'; 'It is simply allowing us to enforce the law.'
